corporate_income_tax.label: UK Corporation Tax 2025/26
corporate_income_tax.notes: Small profits rate 19% (≤£50k), main rate 25% (>£250k). Simplified as two brackets; marginal relief (MR) applies between £50k–£250k. Finance Act 2023.

income_tax.label: UK Income Tax 2025/26
income_tax.notes: Personal allowance £12,570 (0%); basic rate 20% to £50,270; higher rate 40% to £125,140; additional rate 45% above. Allowance tapers to zero above £100k.

payroll_employee.label: UK NIC Employee Class 1 2025/26
payroll_employee.notes: Employee Class 1 NIC: 0% below Primary Threshold (£12,570/yr); 8% on £12,570–£50,270; 2% above Upper Earnings Limit (£50,270). Autumn Budget 2024.

payroll_employer.label: UK NIC Employer Class 1 2025/26
payroll_employer.notes: Employer Class 1 NIC: 15% on earnings above Secondary Threshold £5,000/yr (from April 2025, Autumn Budget 2024; previously £9,100). No upper earnings limit.

vat_reduced.label: UK VAT Reduced Rate 2025/26
vat_reduced.notes: Reduced VAT rate 5% (domestic energy, children's car seats, etc.). VATA 1994 Sch 7A.

dividend_tax.label: UK Dividend Tax Basic Rate 2025/26
dividend_tax.notes: Basic rate dividend tax 8.75% (applies within basic-rate band after £500 dividend allowance). Higher rate 33.75%, additional rate 39.35% not modelled here.
